description_long: This is a modern, boxy house with a flat roof and multiple outdoor terraces, surrounded by several trees and a swimming pool. The structure features a mix of white and dark gray exterior walls, with large windows and a rooftop area that includes railings and a circular structure, possibly a skylight or observatory. The main entrance is accessed by a staircase leading up to a raised deck, and there are additional stairs connecting different levels of the outdoor space. The property is landscaped with a combination of potted and planted trees, and there is outdoor furniture near the pool. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with some wooden elements in the stairs and deck. The overall design is minimalist and functional, emphasizing clean lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, outdoor terraces, a swimming pool, and surrounding trees. The exterior is a mix of white and dark gray, with minimalist landscaping and multiple staircases.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entrance staircase, pool, large potted tree, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, rooftop structures, and a large potted tree behind the house.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the solid wall, rooftop railings, and several trees positioned around the property.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with a clear look at the pool, deck, and a large potted tree in the foreground.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and rooftop openings
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a staircase leading to a raised deck, with a simple door and minimal overhang, no porch or columns.
